blocks.content: In this milestone, you add `thresholds` so k6 exits non-zero when latency, errors, or check pass rate violate your baseline.
You'll attach quantitative gates that CI systems can trust using the process exit code.

Optionally guard correctness with a checks threshold:

```javascript
thresholds: {
  http_req_duration: ['p(95)<500'],
  http_req_failed: ['rate<0.01'],
  checks: ['rate>0.99'],
},
```

`checks: ['rate>0.99']` fails if overall check pass rate drops below 99%.
Your script now fails fast when the baseline regresses instead of only printing numbers.
In the next milestone, you prove thresholds pass under normal settings and fail when deliberately broken.
